name: ambiguous-qa-20-turns
description: 20 turns ending in a vague /skill command. Judge must reject the first brief and surface a clarification question. Second Actor/Judge pass succeeds after a (simulated) user clarification.

skill.name: edit
skill.instructions: Small edit skill. Use codebase-retrieval to locate the target, then apply the requested change.

messages.content: We have a bug somewhere in the formatting.
Actually — back to the project plan.
And we need that auth fix in.
Random: do you like TypeScript or Go better?
No preference — both have their strengths.
Let's deal with the bug now.
